inputs.label: Measured Voltage
inputs.businessContext: RMS voltage measured across the inductor (optional for experimental verification)

businessContext_i18n.tr: İndüktör üzerinde ölçülen RMS gerilimi (deneysel doğrulama için isteğe bağlı)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension efficace mesurée aux bornes de l'inducteur (optionnel pour vérification expérimentale)
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión RMS medida en el inductor (opcional para verificación experimental)

inputs.label: Measured Current
inputs.businessContext: RMS current through the inductor (optional for experimental verification)

businessContext_i18n.tr: İndüktörden geçen RMS akımı (deneysel doğrulama için isteğe bağlı)
businessContext_i18n.de: RMS-Strom durch die Induktivität (optional für experimentelle Überprüfung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Courant efficace traversant l'inducteur (optionnel pour vérification expérimentale)
businessContext_i18n.es: Corriente RMS a través del inductor (opcional para verificación experimental)
